title: Gesture recognition radar systems and methods
abstract: In a recognition method, movement characteristics of an object are determined based on sensor information; image information of the object is determined based on the sensor information; and one or more gesture recognition operations are performed based on the movement characteristics and the image information to generate gesture recognition information. The recognition method may further include determining one or more physical characteristics of the object based on the image information; performing one or more physical characteristic pattern recognition operations based on the one or more physical characteristics to generate pattern recognition information; and generating a recognition output signal based on the gesture recognition information and the pattern recognition information.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A recognition method, comprising: determining movement characteristics of an object based on sensor information; determining image information of the object based on the sensor information; and performing one or more gesture recognition operations based on the movement characteristics and the image information to generate gesture recognition information. 2. The recognition method of claim 1, further comprising: determining one or more physical characteristics of the object based on the image information; performing one or more physical characteristic pattern recognition operations based on the one or more physical characteristics to generate pattern recognition information; and generating a recognition output signal based on the gesture recognition information and the pattern recognition information. 3. The recognition method of any of the above claims, wherein the one or more gesture recognition operations comprise comparing detected gesture data to stored gestured data to generate the gesture recognition information. 4. The recognition method of claim 2, wherein the one or more physical characteristic pattern recognition operations comprise comparing detected characteristic data to stored characteristic data to generate the pattern recognition information. 5. The recognition method of any of claims 1-2, wherein the sensor information is generated by a radar sensor configured to radiate one or more radar signals and detect one or more reflected signals reflected by the object. 6. The recognition method of claim 2, wherein the one or more physical characteristics comprise dielectric information of the object. 7. The recognition method of claim 5, wherein the one or more physical characteristics comprise dielectric information of the object, the dielectric information including dielectric constant data corresponding to one or more frequencies of the one or more radar signals. The recognition method of claim 5, wherein the radar sensor is millimeter wave radar 9. The recognition method of claim 5, wherein the radar sensor is configured to radiate the one or more radar signals at a frequency of about 24 GHz to about 300 GHz. 10. The recognition method of any of claims 1-2, wherein the image information is further determined based on the movement characteristics. 11. The recognition method of claim 2, further comprising authenticating a user of a device based on the recognition output signal. 12. The recognition method of claim 2, further comprising generating a control signal configured to control an external device based on the recognition output signal. 13. A method, comprising: determining a physical characteristic of an object based on a detected image of the object; recognizing a gesture performed by the object based on a detected movement of the object; and generating an output signal based on the physical characteristic and the recognized gesture. 14. The method of claim 13, further comprising: sensing the object using a radar sensor to generate radar information, wherein the detected image and the detected movement are determined based on the radar information. 15. The method of claim 14, wherein the radar sensor is configured to radiate one or more radar signals and detect one or more reflected signals reflected by the object to generate the radar information. The method of any of claims 14-15, wherein the radar sensor is millimeter wave radar 17. The method of any of claims 14-15, wherein the radar sensor is configured to radiate the one or more radar signals at a frequency of about 24 GHz to about 300 GHz. 18. The method of any of claims 13-15, wherein determining the physical characteristic comprises comparing detected characteristic data to stored characteristic data. 19. The method of any of claims 13-15, wherein recognizing the gesture comprises comparing a detected gesture to a stored gestured. 20. The method of any of claims 13-15, wherein the physical characteristic comprises dielectric information of the object. 21. The method of claim 15, wherein the physical characteristic comprises dielectric information of the object, the dielectric information including dielectric constant data corresponding to one or more frequencies of the one or more radar signals. 22. The method of claim 14, wherein the detected image is further determined based on the detected movement. 23. The method of any of claims 13-14, wherein the recognized gesture is further determined based on the detected image. 24. The method of claim 13, further comprising authenticating a user of a device based on the output signal. 25. The method of claim 13, further comprising controlling an external device based on the output signal. A recognition device, comprising: radar circuitry that is configured to sense an object to generate radar information; and a recognition processor that is configured to: 

 determine a physical characteristic of the object based on the radar information; recognize a gesture performed by the object based on radar information; and generate an output signal based on the physical characteristic and the recognized gesture. 27. The recognition device of claim 26, wherein the recognition processor is further configured to: detect an image of the object based the radar information, wherein the physical characteristic of the object is determined based on the detected image; and detect a movement of the object based on the radar information, wherein the gesture is recognized based on the detected movement. 28. The recognition device of any of claims 26-27, wherein the radar circuitry is configured to radiate millimeter wave radar signals. 29. The recognition device of any of claims 26-27, wherein the radar sensor is configured to radiate the one or more radar signals at a frequency of about 24 GHz to about 300 GHz. 30. The recognition device of claim 26, wherein the physical characteristic comprises dielectric information of the object. 31. The recognition device of claim 26, wherein the physical characteristic comprises dielectric information of the object, the dielectric information including dielectric constant data corresponding to one or more frequencies of one or more radar signals. 32. The recognition device of claim 26, wherein the recognition processor is further configured to authenticate a user of a device based on the output signal. 33. The recognition device of claim 26, wherein the recognition processor is further configured to control an external device based on the output signal. 34. A communication device comprising the recognition device of claim 26. 35. A computer program product embodied on a computer-readable medium comprising program instructions, when executed, causes a processor to perform the method of any of claims 1, 2, 13, 14, and 15. 36. An apparatus substantially as shown and described. 37. A method substantially as shown and described.
